name: M5: Providers + Router
description: Multi-provider LLM support with adapters for OpenAI, Anthropic, GLM, Qwen, and MiniMax. Model routing per agent role, budget tracking, credential security via macOS Keychain, and router UI.
notes: All providers normalized to Tide's internal StreamEvent format (start/delta/end).
API keys stored in macOS Keychain via Rust security-framework crate — never on disk in engine.
Budget tracking: daily and session limits enforced, stored in SQLite token_usage table.
Role-based model routing: different models for Scout/Planner/Builder/Validator.
JSON mode: enforced per-provider (native json_object where supported, system prompt enforcement otherwise).

tasks.title: Define provider adapter interface and types
tasks.description: Create apps/engine/src/providers/types.ts: ProviderConfig (id, displayName, apiBase, authType, models[]), ModelConfig (id, displayName, contextWindow, maxOutputTokens, inputPricePer1kTokens, outputPricePer1kTokens, supportsFunctions, supportsStreaming, supportsJsonMode), CompletionRequest (requestId, model, messages[], systemPrompt, temperature, maxTokens, jsonMode, abortSignal), TokenUsage (promptTokens, completionTokens, totalTokens, estimatedCostUsd), normalized StreamEvent types (start/delta/end). Create apps/engine/src/providers/adapter.ts: ProviderAdapter interface (initialize, healthCheck, streamCompletion returning AsyncIterable<StreamEvent>, listModels). Create apps/engine/src/providers/base-adapter.ts: abstract BaseProviderAdapter with shared SSE parsing, error handling, retry, abort signal wiring. Abstract methods: transformChunk, buildRequest.

tasks.title: Implement OpenAI provider adapter
tasks.description: Create apps/engine/src/providers/adapters/openai.ts: extends BaseProviderAdapter. API: POST https://api.openai.com/v1/chat/completions with stream:true. Auth: Authorization: Bearer <key>. JSON mode: response_format: { type: 'json_object' }. SSE parsing: data: {choices:[{delta:{content:'...'}}]}. Usage from final chunk. Models: gpt-4o, gpt-4o-mini, o3, etc. with context windows and pricing.

tasks.title: Implement Anthropic provider adapter
tasks.description: Create apps/engine/src/providers/adapters/anthropic.ts: extends BaseProviderAdapter. API: POST https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages with stream:true. Auth: x-api-key header + anthropic-version. System prompt as separate 'system' field. SSE events: message_start, content_block_start, content_block_delta, message_delta, message_stop. Usage from message_start and message_delta events. JSON mode: via system prompt instruction. Models: claude-sonnet-4-20250514, claude-opus-4-20250514, claude-haiku-4-5-20251001, etc.

tasks.title: Implement GLM (Zhipu) provider adapter
tasks.description: Create apps/engine/src/providers/adapters/glm.ts: extends BaseProviderAdapter. API: POST https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/chat/completions. Auth: JWT token generated from API key (key format: {id}.{secret}, must sign JWT with HS256). OpenAI-compatible SSE format. JSON mode: response_format: { type: 'json_object' }. Models: glm-4, glm-4-flash, glm-4-long.

tasks.title: Implement Qwen (DashScope) provider adapter
tasks.description: Create apps/engine/src/providers/adapters/qwen.ts: extends BaseProviderAdapter. API: POST https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1/chat/completions (OpenAI-compatible mode). Auth: Authorization: Bearer <key>. OpenAI-compatible SSE format. JSON mode: supported via response_format. Models: qwen-max, qwen-plus, qwen-turbo, qwen-long.

tasks.title: Implement MiniMax provider adapter
tasks.description: Create apps/engine/src/providers/adapters/minimax.ts: extends BaseProviderAdapter. API: POST https://api.minimax.chat/v1/text/chatcompletion_v2. Auth: Authorization: Bearer <key> + X-MiniMax-Group-Id header. Custom SSE format with MiniMax-specific fields. JSON mode: via reply_constraints + system prompt. Models: abab6.5-chat, abab5.5-chat. Token usage from response usage object.

tasks.title: Create provider registry and factory
tasks.description: Create apps/engine/src/providers/index.ts: PROVIDER_REGISTRY mapping provider ID to factory function. createAdapter(providerId) returns new adapter instance. Export all provider configs with default model listings. Used by ModelRouter to instantiate adapters on demand.

tasks.title: Build ModelRouter
tasks.description: Create apps/engine/src/router/router.ts: ModelRouter class. route(request, role) method: 1) resolve model from role-based defaults in RoutingConfig, 2) check budget via BudgetTracker, 3) get/create adapter, 4) forward request yielding StreamEvents, 5) on StreamEnd record usage. Supports fallback chain if primary provider fails. Create apps/engine/src/router/config.ts: RoutingConfig (roleDefaults mapping role to ModelSelection, BudgetConfig with dailyLimitUsd, sessionLimitUsd, warningThresholdPercent). Persisted in TIDE.md.

tasks.title: Implement budget tracking
tasks.description: Create apps/engine/src/router/budget.ts: BudgetTracker class. Records token usage to SQLite token_usage table (id, session_id, provider, model, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, estimated_cost_usd, created_at). Methods: record(usage), getDailySpend(), getSessionSpend(), assertWithinBudget(estimatedCost) throws BudgetExceededError, getSummary() returns BudgetSummary. Create apps/engine/src/router/cost-estimator.ts: CostEstimator for pre-request cost estimation based on message token count + model pricing.

tasks.title: Implement macOS Keychain credential storage
tasks.description: Create apps/desktop/src-tauri/src/keychain.rs: functions to store, retrieve, and delete credentials using the security-framework crate (macOS Keychain). Service name: 'dev.tide.ide'. Account format: 'provider.<providerId>.apiKey'. Add IPC message types: secure_store, secure_retrieve, secure_delete. Wire into Rust IPC handler. Engine requests credentials from Rust on startup and when provider is configured.

tasks.title: Build ProviderSettings UI
tasks.description: Create apps/desktop/src/components/Settings/ProviderSettings.tsx: settings panel listing all supported providers with status indicators (configured/not configured/error). For each provider: API key input (masked), optional org ID, 'Test Connection' button that calls healthCheck. On success: shows latency and available model list. On save: sends credential to engine -> Rust Keychain. Create apps/desktop/src/stores/routerStore.ts: Zustand store with providers, routing config, budget summary.

tasks.title: Build ModelPicker UI
tasks.description: Create apps/desktop/src/components/Settings/ModelPicker.tsx: table with rows for each role (Scout, Planner, Builder, Validator). Each row: dropdown showing available models grouped by provider (only configured providers). Shows context window and price per 1K tokens. 'Apply' button saves to RoutingConfig. Persists to TIDE.md via engine IPC.

tasks.title: Build status bar indicators (budget + active model)
tasks.description: Create apps/desktop/src/components/StatusBar/BudgetIndicator.tsx: shows '$X.XX / $Y.YY daily' with color coding matching context dial thresholds. Hover tooltip: breakdown by provider, by role, session vs daily. Create apps/desktop/src/components/StatusBar/ActiveModelIndicator.tsx: shows current active model/provider. Click opens quick-switch popover for changing builder model on the fly. Both integrated into the bottom status bar.

tasks.title: Replace hardcoded LLM client with ModelRouter
tasks.description: Update apps/engine/src/orchestration/orchestrator.ts to use ModelRouter instead of the hardcoded LLMClient from Phase 5. Each agent role (scout, planner, builder, validator) now routes through the ModelRouter which selects the appropriate provider+model. Update llm-client.ts to become a thin wrapper that delegates to ModelRouter. Verify the full agentic workflow still works with the new routing.
